title: lochnera lancea
intro: Lochnera lancea, also known as Indian spurge or lance-leaved spurge, is a type of flowering plant in the spurge family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and promoting digestive health. Lochnera lancea can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or oils, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
